name: lexaureon-benchmark
description: Reproducible benchmark suite for Lex Aureon constitutional AI governance

scripts.score:all: npm run harmbench:score -- --in benchmarks/harmbench/results.jsonl && npm run advbench:score -- --in benchmarks/advbench/results.jsonl && npm run jailbreakbench:score -- --in benchmarks/jailbreakbench/results.jsonl
